signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rates at 2.5% Amid Rising Inflation Concerns | NO change to policy rate | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board announced on April 10, 2026, that it would maintain its benchmark interest rate at 2.5% for the seventh consecutive month following a unanimous decision[5]. This decision confirms market expectations and represents **no policy change** despite i

signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Institutional Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Institutional Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP unseated Bitcoin and Solana to record the largest weekly inflow from digital asset investors at $119.6 million—its strongest weekly haul since mid-December 2025—signaling accelerating institutional interest.[3]

signals.headline: **The BOK now expects headline inflation to "exceed considerably" its previous February forecast of 2
signals.raw: **The BOK now expects headline inflation to "exceed considerably" its previous February forecast of 2.2%** due to surging oil prices from the Iran conflict and won weakness[6]. The board anticipates inflation to rise into the "mid to upper two-percent range"[5].

signals.headline: VP Vance Leads Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
VP Vance Leads Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan | YES | HIGH confidence**

Vice President JD Vance is leading U.S. diplomatic efforts in Islamabad, Pakistan, engaging in peace negotiations with Iran[3]. These talks appear connected to resolving the Strait of Hormuz crisis that triggered the removal demands.

signals.headline: Based on the search results, here are the key market-moving developments:
signals.raw: Based on the search results, here are the key market-moving developments:

signals.headline: **March inflation came in at 2
signals.raw: **March inflation came in at 2.2% annually**, undershooting the median forecast of 2.4% but remaining above the central bank's 2% target[1][2]. On a monthly basis, consumer prices rose 0.3%, weaker than the 0.6% forecast[2].

signals.headline: **Core inflation (excluding volatile food and energy) declined to 2
signals.raw: **Core inflation (excluding volatile food and energy) declined to 2.2% in March** from 2.3% in February, suggesting some moderation in underlying price pressures[2].

signals.headline: **Economic growth concerns**: The board lowered 2026 growth expectations to below 2% amid currency depreciation (won tra
signals.raw:
**Economic growth concerns**: The board lowered 2026 growth expectations to below 2% amid currency depreciation (won trading around 1,520 per USD) and oil price shocks[5][6].

signals.headline: SEC Regulatory Roundtable Scheduled for April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Regulatory Roundtable Scheduled for April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**
An upcoming SEC roundtable on options market structure (April 16) could influence sentiment around crypto asset classification, with pro-clarity commissioners Hester Peirce and Mark Uyeda potentially signaling regulatory direction.[4]
